title: Big tech attrition: the invisible toll
meta_description: Cut on-call pages 91% with Redis TTL and circuit breakers — how senior engineers quietly burn out and what concrete metrics to track in 2026.
prewritten_tweet:
Most senior engineers quit Big Tech not for money.

They quit because the invisible tax of un-tuned caches, stale alerts, and 3 a.m.

https://kubaik.github.io/big-tech-attrition-the-invisible-toll

#FutureTech #Tech #Technology #Redis

Where do you think most teams still get this wrong?
